summary: Amazon MFN/Easy Ship tracking and Expenses dashboard testing completed. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Expenses dashboard correctly displays amounts using gross_amount || amount fallback (rent entries showing ₹50,000.00). Amazon Orders page shows MFN Pending, Easy Ship, Tracking Added, Dispatched tabs with firm selector. No Amazon orders in preview environment to test tracking dialog, but code review confirms MFN validation requires Customer Name, Phone (10 digits), City, State, Pincode while Easy Ship only requires Tracking ID.
critical_code_review_comments: ExpensesDashboard.jsx line 70: getExpenseAmount helper correctly uses gross_amount || amount || 0 for stats calculation
ExpensesDashboard.jsx line 297: Table cell correctly displays expense.gross_amount || expense.amount
AmazonOrders.jsx lines 199-212: MFN validation correctly requires customer_name, phone (10-digit regex), city, state, pincode
AmazonOrders.jsx lines 222-229: MFN-specific fields added to payload only for non-Easy Ship orders
server.py lines 20150-20156: Backend validates MFN fields - customer_name, phone (10 digits), city, state, pincode required
server.py lines 20232-20259: Amazon tracking creates pending_fulfillment entry with all customer details
server.py lines 11646-11689: dispatch_pending_fulfillment creates dispatch entry and calls create_sales_order_from_dispatch
server.py lines 3849-3936: create_sales_order_from_dispatch creates sales_orders entry with order_source='amazon' for marketplace orders
seed_data_creation: Test expense created with gross_amount=50000 during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amazon MFN/Easy Ship tracking flow implemented. No Amazon orders currently synced in preview environment (orders were synced in production). To test full flow: 1) Sync Amazon orders via Fetch from Amazon button, 2) Add tracking to MFN order (requires customer details), 3) Dispatch from pending_fulfillment queue, 4) Verify sales_order created in Sales > Orders > New Orders tab. Expenses dashboard at /accountant/expenses shows rent entries with gross_amount correctly.

Backend Tests.GET /api/expenses: PASS - Returns expenses with gross_amount field
Backend Tests.POST /api/amazon/update-tracking: PASS - Endpoint exists, returns 404 for non-existent order
Backend Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment: PASS - Endpoint exists and returns data

Frontend Tests.Expenses Dashboard: PASS - Shows Total Expenses ₹1,74,841.22, Platform Fees, Ad Spend, TCS/TDS Credits
Frontend Tests.Expenses Table: PASS - Shows rent entries with ₹50,000.00 (gross_amount displayed correctly)
Frontend Tests.Amazon Orders Page: PASS - Shows MFN Pending, Easy Ship, Tracking Added, Dispatched tabs
Frontend Tests.Firm Selector: PASS - Dropdown works, shows 'Electronics Bay' firm
Frontend Tests.Fetch from Amazon button: PASS - Button visible and enabled after firm selection

Code Review Verification.MFN tracking validation: VERIFIED - Requires customer_name, phone (10 digits), city, state, pincode
Code Review Verification.Easy Ship tracking: VERIFIED - Only requires tracking_number and carrier_code
Code Review Verification.pending_fulfillment creation: VERIFIED - Created on amazon/update-tracking with all customer details
